businessSummary.oneLiner: Government & enterprise AI data analytics platform leader — Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), AIP (AI platform) trifecta
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and enterprise organizations. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+56% YoY), adjusted operating margin 32%. Friday close $150.95 (-1.66%). Death cross occurred but RSI 53 not oversold. AIPCon 9 delivered massive partnerships with GE Aerospace, Polymarket + co-announced sovereign AI data center architecture with NVIDIA.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry — industrial data analytics)
keyProducts: Sovereign AI Data Center — Joint architecture with NVIDIA

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high valuation. Maximum AI premium reflected

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. Not oversold despite death cross

growthDrivers.title: NVIDIA Sovereign AI Data Center Architecture Co-Announcement
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/14): Palantir and NVIDIA jointly announced turnkey sovereign AI data center architecture. Addresses global government demand for independent AI infrastructure. Major catalyst for government AI market expansion.

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9 Mission-Critical Partnership Wave (3/12)
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): GE Aerospace (military aviation maintenance), Centrus Energy (nuclear AI), Ondas (drone ISR), World View (stratospheric ISR), LG CNS — multi-year contracts. Defense, energy, manufacturing, prediction market AI expansion.

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket Sports Betting Integrity Platform — New TAM
growthDrivers.description: Barchart (3/13): Co-developing Vergence AI sports integrity platform with Polymarket+TWG AI. New application in prediction markets + AI analytics.

growthDrivers.title: 2026 Guidance $7.18-7.20B (+61%) — Record Growth Outlook
growthDrivers.description: Tickeron: 2026 revenue guidance $7.18-7.20B, +61% YoY growth. Significantly exceeds prior consensus. AIP bootcamp strategy accelerating commercial revenue conversion.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ year track record in government/defense AI. Security clearance as entry barrier. NVIDIA sovereign AI partnership expands global government market. 'Ontology' platform as unique moat.

moats.description: Top US DoD/intelligence security clearances. Competitor entry virtually impossible.
Turnkey sovereign data center architecture for government AI market worldwide.
5-day intensive pilot → enterprise-wide expansion. High conversion rate.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General-purpose vs Palantir specialized analytics

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data lakehouse. Expanding into analytics platform

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI. Trails Palantir in scale and track record

recentNews.headline: Palantir-NVIDIA Announce Sovereign AI Data Center Turnkey Architecture
recentNews.significance: Addresses global government demand for independent AI infrastructure. Massive TAM expansion

recentNews.headline: Finbold: PLTR Death Cross — $70 Crash Possibility Warning
recentNews.significance: 50-day SMA crosses below 200-day SMA. 2021 pattern repeat concern. Technical bearish signal

recentNews.headline: Yahoo Finance: Mission-Critical AI Partnerships with GE, Centrus, NVIDIA Expanding
recentNews.significance: Defense, energy, manufacturing diversification. Investment story evolving

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'PLTR Up +2,200% Since 2023 — Can Its Run Continue?'
recentNews.significance: Valuation overheating concerns. Some Wall Street analysts warn of -68% downside

recentNews.headline: Rosenblatt Raises Target to $200 — Maintains Strong Buy

analystOpinions.notableComment: 20 analysts Buy consensus. MarketBeat $192.68 (+28%). Rosenblatt $200 Strong Buy, UBS $180. 1 Sell ($50) — valuation overheating warning.

risks.title: Death Cross — Technical Bearish Signal
risks.description: 50-day SMA ($153.85) crossed below 200-day ($162.81). Similar 2021 October pattern preceded -60% decline. Further short-term downside possible.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation — P/E 240x, P/S 81x
risks.description: $4.48B revenue company at $361B market cap. Growth slowdown could trigger sharp multiple contraction.

risks.title: Share Dilution — YoY +4.67%
risks.description: Stock-based compensation drives ~5% annual dilution. Long-term shareholder value erosion.

risks.title: Government Budget Dependency — Political Risk
risks.description: Defense budget cuts could impact government contract revenue. DOGE-related political risk.

risks.title: Big Tech AI Platform Competition
risks.description: Microsoft, Google, Amazon intensifying enterprise AI platform push. Commercial revenue growth could slow.

buyReasons.title: NVIDIA Sovereign AI Partnership — Government TAM Expansion
buyReasons.rationale: Turnkey sovereign data centers for governments worldwide. Unique positioning within NVIDIA ecosystem.

buyReasons.title: 2026 Guidance $7.2B (+61%) — Record Growth Rate
buyReasons.rationale: Guidance significantly exceeds prior consensus. AIP commercial conversion accelerating.

buyReasons.title: AIPCon 9 Massive Partnerships — TAM Diversification
buyReasons.rationale: Defense, energy, aviation, sports — new industry verticals. Reducing government dependency.

buyReasons.title: FCF Margin 47% + Debt-Free — Strongest Financials
buyReasons.rationale: Cash $7.18B, debt $229M. 47% FCF margin funds self-sustaining growth.

overallOpinion: Palantir is the undisputed AI data analytics leader. FY2025 +56%, FY2026 guidance +61% explosive growth + NVIDIA sovereign AI partnership dramatically expands government TAM.
Death cross and P/E 240x are clear warnings. 2021 precedent of -60% decline exists, but unlike then, current fundamentals show real revenue growth (+56%) and 47% FCF margin.

GE/Centrus/NVIDIA mission-critical partnerships strengthen the investment story. At the intersection of short-term technical weakness and long-term fundamental strength. Dollar-cost averaging recommended.

investmentVerdict.summary: Explosive growth (+61%) + NVIDIA sovereign AI partnership + security clearance moat. Dollar-cost average through death cross.
